skill.name: Copywriting
skill.description: Write, rewrite, or improve marketing copy for any page with conversion best practices.
skill.summary: Expert conversion copywriting skill that produces clear, credible, and action-oriented marketing copy aligned with user intent and business goals.
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: This is a prompt-only copywriting skill with no executable code. Static analysis scanned 0 files and detected no security patterns. The skill consists entirely of instructions for AI-assisted marketing copy creation with no network access, file operations, or external command execution. Safe for publication.

content.user_title: Write high-converting marketing copy with proven frameworks
content.value_statement: Struggling with vague or ineffective marketing copy that fails to convert visitors. This skill guides you through a structured process to create clear, credible, and action-driven copy aligned with your audience and business goals.
actual_capabilities: Gathers audience insights, page purpose, and product context before writing copy
Presents a copy brief summary for approval before drafting any content
Writes structured page copy with headlines, subheadlines, and CTAs
Provides 2-3 alternative options for headlines and primary CTAs with rationales
Documents assumptions and ensures copy is testable for A/B experiments
Applies conversion principles: clarity over cleverness, benefits over features, specificity over buzzwords
limitations: Cannot fabricate claims, statistics, testimonials, or guarantees - all proof must be provided by user
Requires user confirmation of the copy brief before proceeding to writing phase
Cannot access external websites or analytics data to gather audience insights
Does not design visual layouts - focuses solely on written copy content

use_cases.title: Landing Page Creation
use_cases.description: Create conversion-optimized landing page copy for a new product launch or marketing campaign.

use_cases.title: Homepage Messaging Refresh
use_cases.description: Rewrite homepage copy to clarify value proposition and improve visitor-to-customer conversion rates.
use_cases.target_user: Startup founders and small business owners

use_cases.title: Pricing Page Optimization
use_cases.description: Develop clear, benefit-focused pricing page copy that addresses objections and guides decision-making.

prompt_templates.title: Basic Copy Improvement
prompt_templates.prompt: I need help improving the copy on my [page type] page. The current headline is: "[current headline]" and the primary CTA is: "[current CTA]". My target audience is [audience description] and they are trying to solve [problem]. Can you suggest improvements that make the value proposition clearer?

prompt_templates.title: New Landing Page Copy
prompt_templates.prompt: I'm launching a [product/service] for [target audience]. The main benefit is [primary outcome]. My differentiator is [key differentiator]. Please gather all necessary context by asking me questions about my audience, their objections, traffic sources, and available proof before writing the landing page copy.

prompt_templates.title: A/B Test Variations
prompt_templates.prompt: I want to A/B test different headlines for my [page type]. Current headline: "[current headline]". My value proposition is [value prop]. Please provide 3 alternative headlines that each emphasize a different angle: 1) outcome-focused, 2) problem-aware, and 3) differentiator-focused. Include a brief rationale for each.

prompt_templates.title: Complete Page Audit and Rewrite
prompt_templates.prompt: Audit and rewrite my [page type] page copy. Here is the current copy: [paste full copy]. My business goals are [goals]. My target customer is [customer profile]. Their main objection is [objection]. Follow the complete workflow: first gather any missing context, then present a copy brief summary for my approval, then provide the rewritten copy with annotations explaining your choices.

output_examples.input: Homepage for a project management tool targeting remote teams. Primary CTA: Start Free Trial. Key differentiator: async-first collaboration.
output: Headline: Ship faster without the meetings
Subheadline: The async-first project management tool built for remote teams who value deep work.
Primary CTA: Start your free 14-day trial
Secondary CTA: See how it works

output_examples.input: Pricing page section explaining the Pro plan at $29/month. Need to justify the price and handle the objection that it is expensive.
output: Section Header: Everything you need to grow
Body: At $29/month, you get unlimited projects, advanced analytics, and priority support. That is less than one hour of a developer's time per week - and it saves your team hours every day.
Proof Point: Teams using Pro report 40% faster sprint completion within the first month.

best_practices: Always confirm the copy brief with stakeholders before writing a single line of copy
Write headlines that are specific and outcome-focused rather than clever or vague
Document all assumptions about audience awareness level and objections explicitly
anti_patterns: Writing copy before understanding the audience, page goal, and available proof
Using buzzwords and company jargon instead of customer language
Fabricating statistics, testimonials, or guarantees to make claims seem stronger

faq.question: What information do I need to provide before copywriting begins?
faq.answer: At minimum: page type, target audience, primary CTA, and key value proposition. The skill will ask follow-up questions about objections, traffic sources, awareness level, and available proof before writing.

faq.question: Can this skill write copy for any type of page?
faq.answer: Yes. It works for homepages, landing pages, pricing pages, feature pages, product pages, and about pages. The structure adapts based on the page type and goal.

faq.question: Will the skill fabricate testimonials or statistics if I do not provide them?
faq.answer: No. This skill explicitly prohibits fabricating claims, data, or testimonials. If proof is missing, it will mark placeholders clearly for you to fill in.

faq.question: How many headline and CTA variations will I receive?
faq.answer: You will receive 2-3 alternative options for headlines and primary CTAs, each with a brief rationale explaining the strategic thinking behind that option.

faq.question: Can I use this skill for A/B testing preparation?
faq.answer: Yes. The skill writes copy with testing in mind, creating clear and isolated value propositions that can be tested. It can generate variations specifically designed for experimentation.

faq.question: What if I need to target multiple audience segments?
faq.answer: The skill focuses on one primary audience per page for clarity. For multiple segments, it can either prioritize the highest-value segment or recommend creating separate page variants for each audience.
